subcodes.first_line: My tongue, My heart, My innermost being, My limbs, My veins, and My very hairs bear witness that verily He is God, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد لسانی و قلبی و حشائی و جوارحی و عروقی و شعراتی انه انا الله رب العالم یشهد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @thankfulness; gratitude
